intro: Over the 15-day period from 12 to 27 April 2026, ZCyberNews tracked 70 articles under the supply-chain tag, spanning 11 critical, 43 high, 11 medium, and 4 informational severity reports. Key threat actors observed include Lazarus Group, CanisterSprawl, and TeamPCP. Notable vulnerabilities are CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177. The technology, software development, cryptocurrency, logistics, and manufacturing sectors were primarily affected, with incidents reported across Global, Asia, Europe, Arctic, and China regions.
